## Introduction

Edge Data Center Statistics: Edge data centers started in 2024 as a niche idea and have grown into an important part of the web’s infrastructure. These facilities are provided in smaller, distributed locations nearer to users and devices to enable less latency in running applications like video streaming or online gaming, AR/VR, and industrial IoT.

This article will present Edge Data Center statistics for the year 2024: market value and growth rates, splits by region, power and trends, innovations, and investment patterns.
